name: ui-reference-copier
description: Chrome extension for copying rendered UI element styles and diffs into AI coding prompts.

scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check content.js && node --check collector.mjs && node --check prompt.mjs && node --check diff.mjs && node --check selection.mjs && node --check label.mjs && node --check groups.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); console.log('manifest valid')"
scripts.pack: cd .. && rm -f ui-reference-copier.zip && zip -qr ui-reference-copier.zip ui-reference-copier -x 'ui-reference-copier/.git/*'
